Index

A D G S 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

applyDiscount(double) - Method in interface structuralAdapterPattern.Discountable
Applies a discount to the object.
applyDiscount(double) - Method in class structuralAdapterPattern.DiscountableAdapter
Applies a discount to the adapted Product.

D

Discountable - Interface in structuralAdapterPattern
The Discountable interface defines the contract for objects that support discounts.
DiscountableAdapter - Class in structuralAdapterPattern
The DiscountableAdapter class adapts a Product to the Discountable interface.
DiscountableAdapter(Product) - Constructor for class structuralAdapterPattern.DiscountableAdapter
Initializes the adapter with a specific Product.

G

getDiscountedPrice() - Method in interface structuralAdapterPattern.Discountable
Retrieves the price of the object after the discount has been applied.
getDiscountedPrice() - Method in class structuralAdapterPattern.DiscountableAdapter
Retrieves the discounted price of the adapted Product.

S

structuralAdapterPattern - package structuralAdapterPattern
The structuralAdapterPattern package contains classes and interfaces that implement the Adapter design pattern.
